SUPIKÖÖGIPOISID.image_alt: Picture of a four-member rap band SUPIKÖÖGIPOISID. The picture is taken outdoors on a cloudy day. In the picture are 4 men wearing dress shirts with black ties and black pants.

Dysaster Collective.image_alt: Bluish digital collage of Dysaster Collective members.
Dysaster Collective.description: Multifaceted collective of creatives founded in 2022.

monospac.ee.image_alt: DJ duo monospacee at their Silent Disco set in Tartu New Theatre hall in 2024. The picture is taken from the side, with DJ Mimmu in the foreground and DJ Rx visible behind her. They are lit with red light, with a third DJ blurrily visible in blue light in the background.

Saueaugu Teatritalu.image_alt: Summer view of Saueaugu theatre building. Green grass is visible below and blue sky with a few clouds can be seen behind the roof.
Saueaugu Teatritalu.description: Small theater in Läänemaa. I wrote the webpage.

Tartu Häkkerikoda.description: Makerspace in Tartu. Member and part of the web team.

pakubiiti.description: Organize the title, artists and cover art of three random albums.

rahvatarkus.name: Crowd intelligence
rahvatarkus.description: Crowdsource answers to your burning questions
rahvatarkus.no_questions: Maybe your friends want to answer or have some burning questions?
rahvatarkus.no_balance: You need to answer questions to unlock more questions!

vaukuivali.name: Wow, that's loud!
vaukuivali.description: Get an intuitive understanding for the loudness of everyday life.

explainer.body: As many know, the decibel scale is logarithmic.

problem.body: That didn't really make sense to me.
problem.footer: So I created this page to understand it more intuitively.

30.title: "Silence"
30.description: aka passive noise in the living room
30.alt: Modern and minimalist design interior room.

40.title: Tick tock
40.description: Ticking sounds from a mechanical watch
40.alt: Disassembled old-fashioned wristwatch. The inside of the watch is visible, showing gears.

50.title: Normal conversation
50.alt: Young couple in the kitchen. Man is cutting pancakes on a plate, woman sits next to him on the stove and watches.

60.title: Bingo!
60.description: Bingo night at a bar (in the middle of the game)
60.alt: The Genialists club operates in Tartu on Magasini street. The picture is from evening time, with many people in the club's outdoor area.

70.title: Where's the remote?
70.description: TV that's playing a bit too loud
70.alt: Someone is watching a movie on television. In the foreground in focus is the TV remote, in the background is a blurry room with a TV against the wall.

80.title: It'd be worse in the USA
80.description: Traffic on Riia hill (waiting for the bus in front of Kaubamaja)
80.alt: Google Street View picture taken in 2012. Shows Tartu Kaubamaja and the bus stop on its Riia street side.

90.title: It'd be in the USA
90.alt: New-looking Harley-Davidson motorcycle quickly driving past on a highway.

100.title: Terminal escape
100.alt: Continental Airlines Boeing 777 lands in foggy Houston IAH airport.

110.title: Road rage
110.alt: Dramatic car stunt for a movie. Collision between two cars.

120.title: Chainsaw
120.description: We reached the pain threshold. I recommend wearing earplugs.
120.alt: Orange and black chainsaw is cutting a fallen tree into smaller pieces.

130.title: How did you get so close?
130.alt: Eight F-16 fighters fly together in formation in the sky.

150.title: Ouch! My ears!
150.alt: Close-up of a person inserting a hearing aid into their ear.
